title: alternanthera filifolia subsp. glaucescens
intro: Alternanthera filifolia subsp. glaucescens, also known as 'Blue Fescue Alternanthera', is a plant species within the Amaranthaceae family, characterized by its silvery-green foliage and compact growth habit. Traditionally, Alternanthera filifolia subsp. glaucescens has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating fever, cough, and respiratory issues, due to its high content of flavonoids and phenolic compounds. The health benefits of Alternanthera filifolia subsp. glaucescens include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which may help in reducing oxidative stress and improving overall well-being. Herbal preparations of Alternanthera filifolia subsp. glaucescens often involve making teas or infusions from its leaves, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal and health benefits.
